notes: Include your name and 'Glamping Activities' in payment notes

name: Horseback Riding at Erik's Ranch
locationDetail: Erik's Ranch & Retreats, south of Livingston, Montana, in Paradise Valley
description: Two-hour guided horseback trail ride through Montana landscapes with views of open ranch land and the Absaroka Mountains. Beginner-friendly, relaxed pace, and led by experienced guides.

name: E-Bike Adventure at Sage Lodge
description: Electric bike adventure exploring the scenic trails and landscapes around Sage Lodge. Perfect for all skill levels with guided routes through Montana's beautiful terrain.

name: Option 1: The Full Yellowstone Loop (Comprehensive)
description: High-intensity, full-day commitment covering the park's most iconic geological and geothermal landmarks. Loop route entering from the North and exiting through the West to see maximum terrain in one day.
duration: Full day - 5.5 to 6 hours driving time (3 hours 15 min return)

name: Option 2: The Western Geothermal Half (Relaxed)
description: Prioritizes the park's hydrothermal activity—geysers and colorful springs—with reduced driving time compared to the full loop. Perfect for a more relaxed pace.
duration: Half day - 4.5 to 5 hours driving time
locationDetail: Yellowstone National Park - Western Geothermal Area

name: Option 3: The Northern Canyon Loop (The Landscape)
description: Most time-efficient option focusing on the dramatic geology of the Grand Canyon of the Yellowstone. Out-and-back route through the North Entrance, keeping you closer to home.

name: Evening S'mores
description: Nightly communal fire pits with supplies provided. Complimentary activity included with your stay at Under Canvas North Yellowstone – Paradise Valley.
locationDetail: Under Canvas North Yellowstone – Paradise Valley

name: Morning Yoga
description: Guided yoga sessions (weather-dependent). Complimentary activity included with your stay at Under Canvas North Yellowstone – Paradise Valley.
locationDetail: Under Canvas North Yellowstone – Paradise Valley

name: Live Acoustic Music
description: Select evenings featuring live acoustic performances. Complimentary activity included with your stay at Under Canvas North Yellowstone – Paradise Valley.
locationDetail: Under Canvas North Yellowstone – Paradise Valley

name: Camp Programming
description: Social events including trivia, bingo, fireside talks, and similar activities. Complimentary activity included with your stay at Under Canvas North Yellowstone – Paradise Valley.
locationDetail: Under Canvas North Yellowstone – Paradise Valley

name: Lawn & Board Games
description: Games available in shared areas for guest use. Complimentary activity included with your stay at Under Canvas North Yellowstone – Paradise Valley.
locationDetail: Under Canvas North Yellowstone – Paradise Valley

name: Complimentary Coffee & Tea
description: Daily complimentary coffee and tea service. Included with your stay at Under Canvas North Yellowstone – Paradise Valley.
locationDetail: Under Canvas North Yellowstone – Paradise Valley
